zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane Harrison於1515年12月30日出生在英國艾可沃爾坦 艾比時，她的父親John Harrison16歲，母親Agnes16歲。她於1550年1月4日之前與Robert Cheney II在英國艾可沃爾坦 艾比結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她於1529年住在英國賀特福爾蕾托 阿維爾。她去世於1597年5月14日在英國艾可沃爾坦 艾比享年81歲，埋葬在英國艾可沃爾坦 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane Harrison于1515年12月30日出生在英国艾可沃爾坦 艾比时，她的父亲John Harrison16岁，母亲Agnes16岁。她于1550年1月4日之前与Robert Cheney II在英国艾可沃爾坦 艾比结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她于1529年住在英国賀特福爾蕾托 阿維爾。她去世于1597年5月14日在英国艾可沃爾坦 艾比享年81岁，埋葬在英国艾可沃爾坦 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Harrison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): from the Middle English personal name Harry or Herry + -son. These were the common pronunciations of Henry (see Harry ).

History: Harrison is an extremely common surname in northern England. One important and influential American family of bearers are descended from Benjamin Harrison, who emigrated from England to VA in 1633 or 1634. Descendants include another Benjamin Harrison (c. 1726–91), who was an activist in the American Revolution and a signer of the Declaration of Independence. His son William Henry Harrison (1773–1841) and great-grandson Benjamin Harrison (1833–1901) both became presidents of the US.

variants.name: Harry
meanings: English (mainly south Wales and southwestern England): from the medieval personal name Harry, a common form of Henry , with assimilation of -nr- to -rr- and regular Middle English change of -er- to -ar-. In south Wales the surname is generally a post-medieval coinage, in most cases not hereditary until the 18th or 19th century.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Hariric, composed of the elements hari, heri ‘army’ + rīc ‘power(ful)’.
Native American (e.g. Navajo): adoption of the English personal name Harry (see 1 above) as a surname.

variants.name: Arrizon
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Mexico): probably an altered form of English   Harrison  .

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Joane Harrison was born on 30 December 1515, in Waltham Abbey, Essex, England, her father, John Harrison, was 16 and her mother, Agnes, was 16. She married Robert Cheney II before 4 January 1550, in Waltham Abbey, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She lived in Little Amwell, Hertfordshire, England in 1529. She died on 14 May 1597, in Waltham Abbey, Essex, England, at the age of 81, and was buried in Waltham Abbey, Essex, England.

Elle a épousé Robert Cheney II avant 4 janvier 1550, à Waltham Abbey, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle a vécu à Little Amwell, Hertfordshire, Angleterre en 1529. Elle est décédée le 14 mai 1597, à Waltham Abbey, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Waltham Abbey, Essex, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane Harrisonが1515年12月30日にイギリスエセックスワルサム アビーで生まれた時，父John Harrisonは16歳，母Agnesは16歳であった。1550年1月4日以前にイギリスエセックスワルサム アビーでRobert Cheney IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1529年にはイギリスハートフォードシュアイアリットル アムウエルに住んでいた。彼女は1597年5月14日にイギリスエセックスワルサム アビーで81歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスワルサム アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.St Botolph Aldgate, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 세인트 벗프'스 c후르치 알드가트
ko.lifeSummary: Joane Harrison(이)가 1515년 12월 30일 영국 에세스 월섬 애브브이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Harrison(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1550년 1월 4일 이전 영국 에세스 월섬 애브브이에서 Robert Cheney II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1529년도에 영국 허트퍼드실르 리틀 아웰에서 살았다. 그녀는 1597년 5월 14일 영국 에세스 월섬 애브브이에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 월섬 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Harrison nasceu em 30 de dezembro de 1515, em Waltham Abbey, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Harrison, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Cheney II antes 4 de janeiro de 1550, em Waltham Abbey, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela viveu em Little Amwell, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra em 1529. Ela faleceu em 14 de maio de 1597, em Waltham Abbey, Essex, Inglaterra, com 81 anos, e foi sepultada em Waltham Abbey, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.St Botolph Aldgate, London, England: сеинт ботолф'с чурч алджэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane Harrison родилась 30 декабря 1515 г. в местности валтам эбби, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени John Harrison было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Cheney II перед 4 январь 1550 г. в местности валтам эбби, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она жила в местности литл амвелл, хиртфордшир, Англия в 1529 году. Она умерла 14 мая 1597 г. в местности валтам эбби, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности валтам эбби, эссекс, Англия.

Se casó con Robert Cheney II antes de 4 de enero de 1550, en Waltham Abbey, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Little Amwell, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra en 1529. Murió el 14 de mayo de 1597, en Waltham Abbey, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultada en Waltham Abbey, Essex, Inglaterra.
